developer_notes: 1. Load vocab.txt into HashMap<String,Integer> on app start. 2. Preprocess SMS text following preprocessing_steps. 3. Split into words, look up unigram IDs. 4. Add bigram IDs for adjacent word pairs found in vocab. 5. Truncate to max_len, pad remaining with 0. 6. Feed int32 array shape [1, max_len] to TFLite. 7. Get float32 output [1,1], compare to threshold.
threshold_note: Recalibrated for split LSTM model after TextVec removal
